JGHRules.GeneralRules1: Jack the Giant Hunter is a 5-reels, 4-rows video slot featuring expanding reels and multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways - %{32768} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 576 ways - 46,656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

JGHRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

JGHCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode, allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
JGHCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
JGHCommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: Winning combinations and payouts are made according to the "Paytable".
JGHCommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
JGHCommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.

JGHMaximumWin.Title: Maximum Win
JGHMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination1: The maximum win amount is %{10000}x of the bet amount.
JGHMaximumWin.MaximumWinExplaination2: If the total win in the main game or the Free Spins Feature reaches %{10000}x of the bet amount, the spin ends.

JGHFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
JGHFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
JGHFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: At the start of every free spin, the total multiplier is x2 and each reel will start with 6 symbols.
JGHFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination3: Each Golden Egg symbol will increase the total multiplier by 2.

JGHFramedSymbols.Title: Framed Symbols
JGHFramedSymbols.FramedSymbolsExplaination1: During any spin, 1 or more framed symbols may appear on the reels.
JGHFramedSymbols.FramedSymbolsExplaination2: At the start of a new round, before the new symbols cascade down, any framed symbol involved in a win during the previous round will transform into either a Sprouting Seed symbol or a Golden Egg symbol.
JGHFramedSymbols.FramedSymbolsExplaination3: Each Sprouting Seed symbol will expand the reel by 1 additional symbol, increasing the number of ways to win.
JGHFramedSymbols.FramedSymbolsExplaination4: If 1 or more reels have 8 symbols, any framed symbol that is involved in a win on those reels will be transformed into Golden Egg symbol.
JGHFramedSymbols.FramedSymbolsExplaination5: Each Golden Egg symbol will increase the total multiplier by 1.
JGHFramedSymbols.FramedSymbolsExplaination6: At the end of every spin, the total win of that spin will be multiplied by the total multiplier.
